name: llm-wiki-skills
description: Graph-first CLI and skill package for maintaining Obsidian-compatible LLM wiki vaults.
author: wei

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node -e "fs.rmSync('.tmp/smoke', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node bin/llm-wiki-skills init --root .tmp/smoke --quiet && node bin/llm-wiki-skills health --root .tmp/smoke --json
